_doc: Domain benchmarks for the Section D forecast generator. Category keys MUST match forecast_categories.category_name EXACTLY (note the double space in 'Gifts  & Outing'). Benchmarks override naive annualization. A null amount means 'flag for input', never fabricate.

Disability Support Pension.reason: Benchmark from observed steady-state Centrelink DSP rate $1420.30/fortnight x 26.0893; trailing deposits are incomplete so naive scaling understates.

Rent.reason: Ron's $250/wk share of a $500/wk shared tenancy (all bills included; Linda pays the other $250). Paid fortnightly ($500) from Ron's account from 16 Jun 2026, when NCAT approved rent transfers. Previously on hold (Linda covered Ron's share) pending NCAT approval, so it does not appear in trailing actuals. $250 x 52 = $13,000/yr.

Other.reason: Single non-recurring receipt (e.g. final/back pay from LACTALIS); routed to Section E one-off, excluded from the recurring Section D forecast.

seasonality_flags.Gifts & Outing: Lumpy/seasonal spend — naive scaling may mislead; verify against expected events.
seasonality_flags.Home & appliances: One-off-heavy (furniture/whitegoods) — verify before trusting the scaled value.
seasonality_flags.Miscellaneous: Contains recurring NRMA insurance miscategorised here — verify and consider re-categorising.
